steps.title: Set up the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability of selecting a defective MP3 player is:

$$P(\text{defective}) = \frac{\text{Number of defective players}}{\text{Total number of players}} = \frac{4}{1,000}$$

steps.title: Convert to decimal and identify the answer
steps.content:
Divide the numerator by the denominator:
$$4 \div 1,000 = 0.004$$

That matches choice A — A is correct.
